body:

Since entering the race in July, our team has seen some strong momentum and we're looking to keep building on our progress.

-John

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Why giving is important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Peter,

I want to thank you for your support so far this
campaign. We're making progress, getting plenty of attention, and
winning respect for the ideas we need to make 21st century a New
American Century. But our work is so far from done: I still need
your help to keep going.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43680166:19002585935:m:3:1349778030:48817FC61663EBC915FF0DCE9277654A:r

I want to talk to you about an especially important issue
for me as a candidate: America's role in the world. This spring
at the Council on Foreign Relations, I laid out my broad foreign
policy doctrine: make America, the indispensable nation, strong
again, protect our economy in a changing world, and restore moral
clarity to our foreign policy.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43680166:19002585935:m:3:1349778030:48817FC61663EBC915FF0DCE9277654A:r

If we have another president who doesn't believe in
American strength, we'll be leaving a country, and a world,
that's even less safe for our children and grandchildren. Just
this last Friday, I laid out how I'd apply the Rubio Doctrine to
an especially important question: how we deal with a rising
China.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43680166:19002585935:m:3:1349778030:48817FC61663EBC915FF0DCE9277654A:r

If you want a candidate who'll take seriously the role
America needs to play in the world, and believes in making
America stronger than it's ever been to meet the challenges of
the 21st century, click here to donate $100, $50, $25, or
whatever you can give right now.

I'm that candidate, and I need your help.

Sincerely,

Marco Rubio

P.S. Today is a crucial fundraising deadline for our
campaign. I need you to make an immediate donation to reach our
goal.

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: DEADLINE: Hours Remaining
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative:

The midnight August 31st end of month
deadline is only hours away.

The national media knows the Big Government
establishment is floundering.

They know it's only a matter of time until
faux conservatives are exposed for what they are, bringing about
another massive shake up in this race for the Republican
nomination.

And they want to know if I have the
grassroots support it will take to WIN.

Fellow Conservative, will you please agree to your most
generous contribution of $20.16 or more IMMEDIATELY?

The truth is, September is when the rubber
meets the road.

It's when campaigns fight to turn their
grassroots support into an on-the-ground organization capable of
reaching every voter in the key early states of Iowa, New
Hampshire, South Carolina and Nevada.

Thanks to your support, I'm not stopping
there.

In fact, just in the past two weeks, I've
traveled to Alaska, Washington State, Wyoming, Idaho and
elsewhere to mobilize supporters of liberty and limited
government.

Voters are thirsting for a candidate who is
serious about reforming government -- not just blowing hot air.

I ran for the Senate in 2010, standing
proudly with the Tea Party because I worried our country was out
of control.

Once elected, my worst fears were proven
right.

Now, I'm running for President because I
believe you and I can make a difference together.

I believe we can protect the freedoms that
have made America the greatest nation in human history with my
concrete plans to:

>>> Cut government spending and tackle our
$18.3 TRILLION debt;

>>> Repeal 100% of Obamacare;

>>> Secure our borders NOW!

>>> Pass my 14.5% Fair and Flat Tax to
unleash economic growth;

>>> Audit the Federal Reserve and expose
their corruption and cronyism;

>>> Stop government spying on innocent
American citizens;

>>> Stand up for the right to life and
DEFUND Planned Parenthood!

As a U.S. Senator, I've charted a far
different course than most politicians . . .

I've kept my promises.

I've delivered.

If elected President, I will deliver again.

And with your help, I believe we can restore
the freedom and prosperity that should be every American's
birthright.

But this end of month deadline is critical.
Please agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 or more
today!

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Last day to be a founding donor of Women for Hillary
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Last day to become a Women for Hillary founding donor. | Friend --

When Charlotte was born, after we'd finished counting her toes and kissing her cheeks, two thoughts crossed my mind.

The first was that I wished my mother, the strongest woman I've ever known, had been able to meet her great-granddaughter.

The second was that I wanted nothing more than for Charlotte and every other little girl to grow up in a world where they know they can be absolutely anything they want to be -- and I wanted them not just to hear that, but to see it, too.

The campaign is getting ready to launch Women for Hillary -- a group of supporters who are invested in making that happen. **[Today is your last chance to become a founding donor and help us start strong.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjMzOTE1ODMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIzMDE5MTY3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Today, I'm thinking about the work that’s still to be done -- and how proud I am of the work we’re doing. Together we can make sure that every woman is paid fairly, can make her own decisions about her body, and has access to affordable health care services.

**Get your name on the record as a founding donor of Women for Hillary by chipping in $1 or more before midnight tonight:

[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/women-for-hillary-founding-donor/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjMzOTE1ODMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIzMDE5MTY3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Every girl and every woman deserves to have the opportunity to fulfill her dreams -- whatever they may be.

Thanks,

Hillary

name: Ron Paul
subject: Don't fall for it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative:

If you want to know what I really think about my son, Rand, then don't listen to our national media.

Don't listen to the Big Government Washington insiders who'd love nothing more than another Bush/Clinton showdown in November of 2016.

Let me be clear...
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30095419:28851382517:m:1:879035888:2BE3ED087087D5A92D018BA7678FD7F0:r)
There is not one candidate who has run for president in my lifetime who can say they fully share my commitment to liberty, Austrian economics, small government, and following the Constitution, than my son, Rand Paul.

That's why I have wholeheartedly endorsed him.

**[And it's why I wanted to write to you today to personally urge you to make your most generous contribution](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30095419:28851382517:m:1:879035888:2BE3ED087087D5A92D018BA7678FD7F0:r)**.

_I know the media likes to play this little game where they pit us, or certain views, against each other_.

Don't fall for it. They're trying to manufacture storylines at liberty's expense. You've spent years seeing how the media treated me. They aren't my friends and they aren't yours.

So please don't waste your time or risk the massive gains you and I have made over the past eight years by suddenly believing Big Government apologists in our media are some sort of truth tellers.

Remember, truth is treason in the empire of lies. And nowhere is that more true than when it comes to Washington, D.C. and their media mouthpieces.

Even where Rand and I do have minor differences of opinion, I would take Rand's position over any of his opponents' in both parties every time.

_That's because he advocates diplomacy and negotiations, and opposes war_.
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30095419:28851382517:m:1:879035888:2BE3ED087087D5A92D018BA7678FD7F0:r)
And Rand is the ONLY one in the race who is standing up for your Liberty, across the board.

You certainly saw a great example of that in the first debate. Chris Christie tried to trample all over your rights in a false attack.

Rand stopped him cold.

And it's nothing new for Rand. Whether it's filibustering to stop drones or the Patriot Act, or introducing the Fourth Amendment Protection Act, no one has fought harder for your rights than Rand.

And that's why, since the moment he announced his candidacy for President of the United States, our national media and the Big Government establishment has gone all-out to smear him or silence him.

They push other Big Government Republicans as "frontrunners" while ignoring polls showing Rand leading Hillary Clinton in key presidential Battleground States.

_They make sure he gets the least amount of time in a national debate (that sounds familiar)_.

They hype other candidates' easy access to Wall Street fat cats who leech off Big Government while ignoring the growing army of small donors Rand is building nationwide.

That's because they fear Rand more than any other candidate. They know he is our best hope to restore liberty, limited government and the Bill of Rights and finally end the big spending status quo in Washington, D.C.

Rand stood on the Senate floor for ten-and-a-half hours to force the Patriot Act to expire. Rand's stamina and determination called the nation's attention to President Obama's illegal and unconstitutional phone records collection. In the Senate, there is no greater champion of the Fourth Amendment and no one as fearless in staring down the establishment, Republican or Democrat.

It was his action, and his alone, that forced the NSA's bulk metadata collection programs to expire under Section 215 of the "PATRIOT Act." Not only that, but he continued to stand strongly against Washington, D.C.'s "Plan B" scheme, the misnamed "USA FREEDOM Act";

When President Obama was insisting on arming the Islamic rebels in Syria and bombing Assad, Rand stood firm and challenged the President. He even took to Fox News' TV airwaves in a live national address to counter President Obama's attempt to "gin up" war fever, infuriating Big Government Republicans like Karl Rove!

And don't forget Rand's first filibuster exposing the Obama administration's lawless use of drones, earning attacks from U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham and "wacko bird" name-calling from Senator John McCain. His historic 13-hour filibuster galvanized the American people unlike anything you and I have ever seen!
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30095419:28851382517:m:1:879035888:2BE3ED087087D5A92D018BA7678FD7F0:r)
He's also THE most stalwart opponent of the Federal Reserve in the Senate. He's fought against ObamaCare every step of the way. He's introduced budgets to slash spending and dig us out of our $18.3 TRILLION debt.

_He will keep our country out of senseless foreign wars that cost so many lives and bleed our treasury dry_. He's not afraid to lay the blame for making worse the chaos we see today with ISIS and Iraq squarely at the feet of the neocons.

And he's proven he's unafraid to stand up to anyone in Washington when the times call for it - even the leadership of his own party.

Rand stands ready to lead, and to win. He has my full support. I ask that he also have yours.

The truth is, Rand needs our grassroots army of liberty lovers more than ever.

The national media and the establishment of both parties would love nothing more than to drive a stake through the heart of our Liberty Movement and stop Rand at all costs.

They're going all-out to destroy him just like they tried to destroy me. And if they succeed, they'll go on to even more spending, spying, welfare and warfare in Washington, D.C.

I was able to weather the media's viciousness because I had patriots like you at my side. Because good folks like you stood with me, the Washington Machine failed. Our Liberty Movement continues to grow.

_Now, my son Rand needs us in his corner_. I'm answering the call. I'm proud to say I "Stand with Rand."

**[Can I count on you to join me? Will you please chip in $20.16 or whatever amount you can afford right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30095419:28851382517:m:1:879035888:2BE3ED087087D5A92D018BA7678FD7F0:r)**?

Please know every dollar is critical.

Unlike other candidates, Rand isn't depending on Wall Street fat-cats and banksters who want more special treatment, bailouts and stimulus packages to bankroll his candidacy.

He's depending on patriots like you who are willing to fight to take our country back.

Please join me in supporting him. **[Please make your most generous contribution TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30095419:28851382517:m:1:879035888:2BE3ED087087D5A92D018BA7678FD7F0:r)**.

For Liberty,

Ron Paul

P.S. There is not one candidate who has run for president in my lifetime who can say they're more committed to liberty, Austrian economics, small government, the Constitution, and a rational foreign policy than my son, Rand Paul.

I'm proud to "Stand with Rand" despite media attacks trying to pit us against each other.

But Rand needs us now more than ever. **[So please chip in $20.16 or whatever you can afford to his campaign](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30095419:28851382517:m:1:879035888:2BE3ED087087D5A92D018BA7678FD7F0:r)**.

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I want you to read this note
body:
#
Dear Friend,
Over the weekend, another positive poll came out for our campaign -- one that showed us within single digits of Hillary Clinton in Iowa for the first time.
I want you to read this note I received from a supporter last week. It speaks to some of the reasons we are doing so well in Iowa, New Hampshire, and states across the country:
> _"I am unemployed. I am uninsured. I am a recent college graduate who graduated with a 3.75 GPA. I am going through a difficult divorce and I have $27 dollars in my bank account. I donated 10 of my remaining 27 dollars because I believe if Bernie is elected I will not have days like this. Days where I stress about where my next meal will come from. Days where I cannot go look for a job because I do not have the gas money to pound the pavement. Days where I cry when thinking about the unpaid medical bills and student loans in my name. I believe things will change. I am making an investment in a person I believe in with the hope that he will change my homeland for the better."_
Our campaign is doing so well because we are telling the truth about the reality of American life today. We are talking about a reality in which most of the new wealth and income in this country are going to the top one percent while working families are struggling more than at any point since the Great Depression.
Our success is also because over 400,000 people have contributed to this campaign, even though some, like the author of the note I shared, can hardly afford it. Through our campaign, the American people are finally telling the billionaire class: "ENOUGH is ENOUGH, this great nation and its government belong to all of the people, not just a wealthy few."
But we still have a long way to go.
**[Friend, make a $3 contribution to our campaign today, and not only will we win Iowa and New Hampshire, but we'll win the presidential election and take the White House back from the billionaire class.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23da/43f17890/5a9c3b83/621d0fbd/3024687592/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/iowa-stories?refcode=em150831am-full")**
Let me tell you another thing. This campaign doesn't have a Super PAC, and I don't spend a lot of time asking rich people to contribute to our campaign. And even if I did, it would probably be a tremendous waste of time.
We will sink or swim based on what we get from the working families of this country. And I could not be more proud of the way we've funded our political revolution.
Here are two more stories I received from campaign contributors last week. I want you to read them -- they are important:
> _"I lost my job in 2012 and my house in 2015. I am currently unemployed and looking for work. I don't have a lot of money and barely surviving on food stamps. Despite all of that, I am compelled to donate because I feel that Bernie Sanders will help bring America back to the middle class. A small donation now in exchange for a better future is a no-brainer. The inequality gap must be fixed!"_
And:
> _"I am broke. I was a proud union electrician. I have never donated money to a politician before however, as broke as I am, I trust Bernie and want to say that I am a part of this revolution. God bless him!"_
When we started this campaign, the word "fringe" was tossed around a few times. No one is using that word any more.
Every day, thousands of people are joining our political revolution. It's why we are leading in New Hampshire, within single digits in Iowa, and closing the gap nationally with each passing day. If we continue to stand together, we're going to win.
**[Make a $3 contribution to our campaign today, and together we'll take our country back from the billionaire class.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23da/43f17890/5a9c3b83/621d0fbd/3024687592/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/iowa-stories?refcode=em150831am-full")**
We will win in 2016. Not just the White House, but the U.S. Senate, U.S. House, and statehouses across the country because we are creating an unprecedented grassroots movement which taps into the American people's desire for real change in this country.
Our success wouldn't be possible without you.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23da/43f17890/5a9c3b83/621d0fbd/3024687592/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/iowa-stories?refcode=em150831am-full")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23da/43f17890/5a9c3b83/621d0fba/3024687592/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23da/43f17890/5a9c3b83/621d0fbb/3024687592/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23da/43f17890/5a9c3b83/621d0fb8/3024687592/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23da/43f17890/5a9c3b83/621d0fb9/3024687592/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

subject: Greetings
body:
Peter, My name is Tyler Foote and I am honored to introduce myself as the new State Director for Americans Prosperity in Virginia!
To view this email as a web page, go [ here.](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=96ce6de7623a3b9dcc3105b18f6a4e15827ca21a8d362de3ab32db3d161ca893d8b274dfa4f37b67)

---|---|---
| | Hello Peter,

My name is Tyler Foote and I am honored to introduce myself as the new State Director for Americans Prosperity in Virginia! Our AFP-Virginia chapter has a proud history of being a leader in the fight for limited government and economic freedom in the Commonwealth, and I look forward to working with each of you to continue that tradition.

By way of introduction, I have spent the last six years advocating for limited government principles at the state and federal level. I have been fortunate to work with activists and leaders in Pennsylvania, North Carolina, and Virginia. It is truly an honor to join the AFP family in the fight for liberty!

My goals for the AFP team in Virginia are simple: build the largest grassroots army in the country to defeat Medicaid expansion once and for all, push back against the EPA's over-reaching regulations that threaten to kill jobs and raise our energy prices, and give parents more freedom over their child's education.

We have many challenging battles ahead of us, but together we have an opportunity to change the future of Virginia. I would like to personally thank you for your continued support and I look forward to working with each of you as we continue to fight for freedom in Virginia!

Thanks,

Tyler Foote
Virginia State Director
Americans for Prosperity

P.S. I'd love to hear about the issues on your mind. Please [drop me a line](mailto:TFoote@afphq.org "drop me a line") and let me know about the opportunities to advance economic freedom and prosperity in your community.

---
| |

\--------------------
Your support will help us continue the fight for economic freedom. [Please donate $5, $10, or $15 today!](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=96ce6de7623a3b9df07e5f4b0e3835d975652dea207aaf6a6f018b5d61f1258f30858a33e0a967ed "Please donate $5, $10, or $15 today!")

body:
| Friend,

This month, _National Journal_ ranked my race as #7 in the country.

That ranking has a lot of repercussions. It means we'll be the focus of many special interest groups. It means everything we do will be scrutinized.

But mostly, it means we have a huge opportunity in Florida.

This race is important -- not just to make the lives of Florida families better, but to put control of the Senate back in Democratic hands. We would be able to stop the attacks on Planned Parenthood and women's reproductive health. We could refocus Congress on things that matter, instead of revisiting the same partisan battles we've been fighting for years.

Winning this race isn't just about Florida -- it's about the future of our country. And I want to make the most of it.

[**I want to make today an opportunity for our campaign. So today, I want to raise an extra $3,000 to help us win.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20c8/738133e4/3accd424/7f8926ad/1730726161/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150831am?refcode=pme150831am_m&recurring=true")

[**Chip in $7 >>>**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20c8/738133e4/3accd424/7f8926ae/1730726161/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150831am?refcode=pme150831am_m&recurring=true&amount=7")

I'm not focusing on the attacks and the smears. I'm not focusing on the ads. I'm focused on doing what's best for Florida families.

And I hope I can count on your support.

body:
---
|
Peter, there are only a few hours left until our August fundraising deadline.

We're on the verge of a record month, and I hope you'll take a moment to make a small donation, even if you've done so already. All you need to do is visit [bencarson.com/contribute](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30097497:28862298839:m:1:876315805:3EE7833473D7E7696CA7AB53CE88A8D7:r).

-Ben
Sent from my iPhone

From: Ben Carson
Subject: They said it was impossible

|
---

Peter, we've had a very strong August. A lot of very good things are happening.

We had a great debate in Cleveland, where I had the opportunity to share my values and solutions directly with the American people -- many of whom had never heard of me.

We're firmly in the top tier of nearly every poll, and even leading Hillary Clinton in a number of swing states.

Hundreds of thousands of new supporters and volunteers have signed up, as well as 700,000 new fans on Facebook.

Through my visits to places like Harlem and the U.S.-Mexico border, we've been leading the national conversation on topics like immigration and the need to embrace faith, personal responsibility and conservative reforms in our inner cities.

This is the kind of momentum that the Washington political class said was impossible. But we're going to continue to prove them wrong.

As August comes to a close, more people will begin to tune into this race -- so it's imperative that we finish the month in the strongest way possible.

[**With that in mind, I ask you to make a donation to my campaign before the clock runs out.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30097497:28862298839:m:1:876315805:3EE7833473D7E7696CA7AB53CE88A8D7:r)

I am continually humbled by the number of people I meet on the campaign trail who tell me they've been sending in small grassroots donations of $5, $10 or even $25. That's the strength of this campaign, and it's why we're going to win.

[**So please, help us close out the month in a strong way. Make a donation before the clock runs out.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30097497:28862298839:m:1:876315805:3EE7833473D7E7696CA7AB53CE88A8D7:r)

Thank you for your faith in me, and for your commitment to reviving the nation we love.

-Ben

name: Jeb Bush
subject: I need you, Friend
body:
Friend -

I know we've emailed you a lot in the past few days, but we're down to the wire now with only 6 hours left to meet our August fundraising goal and we're still $12,486 short.

The good news is a group of generous donors saw my Dad's email yesterday (he really is the greatest man alive) and agreed to match _every dollar_ that comes in before midnight.

**That 's right. Every dollar you chip in now will be matched 100% by these donors. [If you chip in $10, we'll raise $20, if you chip in $50, it'll get us $100, and if you can chip in $100, that means $200 will go towards defeating Hillary in 2016.](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/kpskwrpqfsvjtztljrgkfjbzppjbqzwqkrdrvqzlvrtv_nprddjkw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

I'd say that's a pretty good deal. Are you going to take them up on their offer in the next 6 hours?

**Friend**
**August Matched Contribution:**** Pending**

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/yvkryfvtcgknmwmsnfzrcnpwvvnptwytrfbfktwskfmg_nprddjkw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

We're all in this together, Friend. We're all troubled by the direction this country is headed and we can't afford Obama's third term with Hillary.

I'm running because I believe I can unite our country, renew American leadership here at home and abroad and turn the page from an era of divisive rhetoric and partisan gridlock.

[**Will you join me in this fight? Will you contribute $50, $25, $5 or whatever you can afford in the next 6 hours?**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/mptgmtpvsdnlwjwcltkgslzjpplzvjmvgtbtnvjcntwb_nprddjkw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

**Remember, no donation is too small and every dollar will have double the impact on the campaign trail.**

If you're with me, if you're ready to fight for my conservative vision, let's finish strong together: [**Jeb2016.com/Donate**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/tphfsbprjcvkwtwlkbgfjkdtppkdrtsrfbmbvrtlvbwj_nprddjkw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Thank you,

Jeb

name: Jeff Weaver, Official Bernie 2016
subject: That Iowa poll
body:
#
When the Des Moines Register polled the Iowa Caucuses before we officially entered the race, **Bernie Sanders trailed Hillary Clinton by more than fifty points.**
In May, shortly after we announced our campaign, her lead was right around 40 points. In June, we cut the margin to twenty-five. And as Bernie shared in his email this morning, **we 've now trimmed the deficit down to single digits -- just seven percentage points.**
This poll confirms what we've known all along: we can shock the political pundits and billionaire class and win the Iowa Caucuses. And from there, we'll take off like a rocket on our way to the Democratic nomination.
But only if we keep up the progress.
**[Make a $3 contribution to Bernie 2016 today and help ensure our campaign has the resources needed to beat the billionaires who are TERRIFIED of our momentum.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23c4/43f17890/5afe8e2e/621d0b06/2341102264/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/iowa-stories?refcode=em150831pm-full")**
There's one more interesting note I want to share with you in the big Iowa Caucus poll. A full NINETY-SIX percent of Bernie backers say their choice is about him and his ideas, not because they dislike any other candidates.
Far too often, Americans go to the polls and feel as if they're voting for the lesser of two or more evils. That is not the case here -- **people BELIEVE in Bernie. We know that you do, too.**
All my best,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
